arts.ttl: Sheffield Wednesday Announces the Return of Owl Logo for 25-26 Third Kit, Fans Available to Pre-order Kit Almost One Year in Advance
arts.sum: Sheffield United have announced that their 24-25 third shirt will feature the return of the iconic Owl logo and is now available for fans to pre-order, almost a year ahead of its official launch.
